title: Image Narrative Showcase

image.title: Primary visual asset
image.caption: Use this area for one photo, product screenshot, map, evidence image, or generated visual that should dominate the page.

narrativeSummary: The image owns the page; supporting text should only frame what the audience should notice.

narrativeItems.title: Primary visual
narrativeItems.description: Keep one strong image as the anchor instead of crowding the page with several assets.

narrativeItems.title: Interpretation
narrativeItems.description: Use compact supporting points to explain why the visual matters.

narrativeItems.title: Evidence note
narrativeItems.description: Preserve image source or credit without turning it into the main message.

conclusion: Best for photo, product screenshot, map, evidence image, or one visual asset that needs concise explanation.
